caribbean.headline: Caribbean Sees High Rain
caribbean.paragraph: Grenada is experiencing a 75% rain probability with winds of 14 kt and wave heights of 4.9 ft, while St. Lucia has a less than 10% rain probability is not mentioned but max wind of 12 kt. I expect the high rain probability in Grenada to be the most impactful weather story in the region today, affecting port operations and passenger activities.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Pick Up
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing 24 kt winds with 4.1 ft wave heights and less than 10% rain probability, while nearby Dubrovnik has 16 kt winds, making for a moderate day at sea with the dominant swell direction coming from the SW. I expect these conditions to prevail throughout the day, with no significant weather systems posing a threat to ships in the Central Mediterranean, including those in port at Marseille and Dubrovnik.
